vocab.example: The watch is a tangible reminder of my father's support during my final exams.

vocab.meaning: một kiệt tác về đồng hồ
vocab.example: I was once gifted a horological masterpiece that featured an incredibly complex mechanical movement.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng di sản (bền bỉ để truyền lại cho đời sau)
vocab.example: The timepiece my mentor gave me is of heirloom-quality, designed to last for generations.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại những kỷ niệm đẹp
vocab.example: Glancing at the watch on my wrist always evokes fond memories of my childhood in the countryside.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề chế tác cực kỳ tinh xảo
vocab.example: I received a watch as a graduation present that boasted exquisite craftsmanship and a hand-polished finish.
